package rulecoverage

func NegativeStringsContainsVsIndex() string {
    ruleID := "strings_contains_vs_index"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`strings.Index(s, sub) != -1` or `strings.Index(s, sub) >= 0` patterns"
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
